news.t: US natgas output and demand to hit record highs in 2026, EIA says
U.S. Natural Gas Futures Extend Decline
BMO and REX Shares Launch U.S. Big Banks and U.S. Big Oil Leveraged & Inverse Leveraged Exchange Traded Notes on NYSE Arca

holdings.infoBox: NRGU is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are Phillips 66 stock at 10.53%, Valero Energy at 10.53%, Marathon Petroleum at 10.50%, Chevron at 10.13%, and EOG Resources at 10.00%.

overview.description: The MicroSectors U.S. Big Oil 3 Leveraged ETN (NRGU) is an exchange-traded note that is based on the Solactive MicroSectors U.S. Big Oil index. The fund tracks three times the performance of an equal-weighted index of US Oil & Gas companies. Index components are selected by market-cap NRGU was launched on Feb 19, 2025 and is issued by REX Microsectors.
infoTable: Solactive MicroSectors U.S. Big Oil Index

data.title: US natgas output and demand to hit record highs in 2026, EIA says
data.text: U.S. natural gas supply and demand will both rise to record highs in ​2026, the U.S. Energy Information Administration said in ‌its Short-Term Energy Outlook on Tuesday.

data.title: U.S. Natural Gas Futures Extend Decline
data.text: U.S. natural gas futures fell, with oil markets continuing to sell off on peace deal hopes and domestic weather-driven demand seen light for the next couple of weeks.
